programme.desc: A look at the life and career of the actor and film-maker, who won Oscars for his role in Wall Street and as producer for One Flew Over the Cuckoos Nest

programme.title: Andre Rieu: Welcome to My World
programme.desc: The violinist looks back at a concert in his home town of Maastricht, where he performed with Jermaine Jackson and Trini Lopez

programme.title: Tales of the Unexpected
programme.desc: A young man takes unorthodox action to chase off his rival in love. John Duttine stars

programme.title: Tales of the Unexpected
programme.desc: A man risks everything for money when he agrees to kill a former classmate. Starring Bryan Marshall, George Sewell and Charles Keating

programme.title: Reinventing the Orchestra with Charles Hazlewood
programme.desc: The conductor examines how to bring the orchestra into the 21st century, exploring six aspects of what makes an ensemble fit for purpose in the modern era

programme.title: Classic Albums
programme.sub-title: Elton John - Goodbye Yellow Brick Road
programme.desc: Elton John discusses the making of his chart-topping 1973 album Goodbye Yellow Brick Road, while lyricist Bernie Taupin adds a personal insight into how the songs were written

programme.title: Discovering Film
programme.desc: A look at the life and career of the actor, whose roles in Jaws, All That Jazz and The French Connection catapulted him to stardom

programme.title: Portrait Artist of the Year
programme.desc: Joan Bakewell and Frank Skinner present the competition to find the UKs most talented portrait artist, and Edinburgh is the setting for the first of two Scottish heats, where 12 hopefuls paint actress and impressionist Ronni Ancona, Downton Abbey writer Julian Fellowes and Helena Kennedy QC. The contestants include a professional artist who trained at the Royal Academy, a call-centre worker, an 18-year-old inspired by Leonardo Da Vinci and a man who paints on wood instead of canvas

programme.title: Tales of the Unexpected
programme.desc: A man with a remarkable memory plans to turn his talent into cash by offering to help someone recall a locker number. Starring Bernard Cribbins, Colin Blakely and Judy Geeson

programme.title: Tales of the Unexpected
programme.desc: A near-bankrupt hotel owner goes to great lengths to get her hands on an inheritance from a rich aunt. Starring Hayley Mills, Stuart Wilson and Phyllida Law

programme.title: Making a Maestro
programme.desc: Documentary following the Donatella Flick Conducting Competition, in which 20 young conductors from across Europe compete for the chance to become an LSO assistant conductor

programme.title: Discovering Film
programme.desc: The life and career of the actor known for roles in films including Taxi Driver, Thelma and Louise, Bad Lieutenant, Sister Act, Reservoir Dogs, Cop Land and The Irishman

programme.title: Roman Holiday (1953)
programme.desc: A princess tires of a tour of European capitals and runs away from her entourage while in Rome. An American newspaper reporter takes her under his wing in the hope of getting an exclusive, but as he shows her the sights of the city, he starts to fall in love with her. Romantic comedy, starring Audrey Hepburn, Gregory Peck, Eddie Albert and Harcourt Williams

programme.title: The Directors
programme.desc: The life and work of Ron Howard, whose films include Splash, Cocoon, Apollo 13, Frost/Nixon, Cinderella Man, Rush, and A Beautiful Mind, for which he won two Oscars

programme.title: Johnson and Knopflers Music Legends
programme.desc: Brian and Mark head to Nashviller to meet up with Marks longtime friend and sometime collaborator Emmylou Harris, who shares her career highlights and discusses her relationship with country rock pioneer Gram Parsons. Theyre joined for a jam session by country music superstar guitarist Vince Gill

programme.title: Miyazaki: Spirit of Nature
programme.desc: Documentary exploring the life and influential work of Japanese animator Hayao Miyazaki, known for films including My Neighbor Totoro and Spirited Away

programme.desc: The actor returns to explore more of the worlds most luxurious hotels and begins in Miamis South Beach, home to some of the most hedonistic and extravagant establishments in America. programme.title: Richard E Grants Hotel Secrets

programme.title: Urban Secrets
programme.desc: Alan Cumming explores the history of Bristol, beginning by learning a grisly secret at the docks before meeting Mercury Prize-winning musician Roni Size to discuss life in the St Pauls and Stokes Croft areas of the city. programme.title: The Colour Room (2021)
programme.desc: Period drama telling the story of Clarice Cliff, who broke the glass ceiling and helped revolutionise the workplace in the 20th century. Clarice is a vivacious young factory worker in the industrial British midlands of the 1920s. Bursting with ideas for colours and shapes, she takes more and more dangerous risks, but manages to stay one step ahead of the workhouse and impress eccentric factory owner Colley Shorter with her talent and innovation. Starring Phoebe Dynevor, Matthew Goode and David Morrissey

programme.title: Chuck Chuck Baby (2024)
programme.desc: Helen lives with her ex-husband, his 20-year-old girlfriend, their new baby, and his dying mother Gwen. Helens life is a grind, but she has a chance at romance when a secret love returns. Writer/director Janis Pughs drama, starring Louise Brealey and Annabel Scholey

programme.title: Funny Girl (1968)
programme.desc: Musical biopic of 1920s singer and comedienne Fanny Brice, who rose from poor beginnings in New Yorks slums to become an overnight star and the toast of Broadway. Her success, however, came at the price of a turbulent private life and an unhappy marriage to a gambler, who grew increasingly jealous of her fame. Starring an Oscar-winning Barbra Streisand, with Omar Sharif, Kay Medford and Walter Pidgeon

programme.title: The Death of Stalin (2017)
programme.desc: The place is Moscow, the year is 1953 and after being in power for nearly 30 years, Soviet dictator Joseph Stalin dies after an inconveniently brief illness. Amid the shock, the members of the Council of Ministers engage in a chaotic bid for power. Armando Iannuccis political satire, starring Andrea Riseborough, Jason Isaacs, Rupert Friend, Simon Russell Beale, Steve Buscemi, Jeffrey Tambor and Michael Palin

programme.title: Edge of Tomorrow (2014)
programme.desc: An inexperienced military officer is sent to the front line in a war against an alien invasion, and dies within minutes. However, at the point of death, he is transported back in time to relive his last day again. As he faces the same battle over and over again, the experience he gains turns him into the ultimate warrior. Sci-fi adventure based on Hiroshi Sakurazakas novel All You Need Is Kill, starring Tom Cruise, Emily Blunt and Brendan Gleeson

programme.title: Furiosa: A Mad Max Saga (2024)
programme.desc: In a post-apocalyptic world, a kidnapped girl grows into a warrior who seeks vengeance against a great biker horde led by the crazed Dementus. Director George Millers Mad Max: Fury Road prequel, starring Anya Taylor-Joy, Chris Hemsworth and Tom Burke

programme.title: The Death of Stalin (2017)
programme.desc: The place is Moscow, the year is 1953 and after being in power for nearly 30 years, Soviet dictator Joseph Stalin dies after an inconveniently brief illness. Armando Iannuccis political satire, starring Andrea Riseborough, Jason Isaacs, Rupert Friend, Simon Russell Beale, Steve Buscemi, Jeffrey Tambor and Michael Palin

programme.title: 48 Hrs (1982)
programme.desc: A hard-bitten cop goes on the trail of two escaped fugitives who killed several of his fellow officers. He needs someone with inside knowledge of the criminals, and is reluctantly forced to temporarily release a fast-talking thief from prison to help him in his investigation. Comedy thriller, starring Nick Nolte, Eddie Murphy and Annette OToole

programme.title: Tootsie (1982)
programme.desc: A New York actors difficult reputation has rendered him unemployable. When a TV soap advertises a new female role, he disguises himself as a woman for the audition - and wins the part. But the character proves so popular, he is forced to keep up the pretence indefinitely. Comedy, starring Dustin Hoffman, Jessica Lange and Bill Murray. Directed by Sydney Pollack, who makes a cameo appearance as Hoffmans agent

programme.title: Singin in the Rain (1952)
programme.desc: A silent-movie star tries to win the heart of an aspiring actress as the introduction of sound changes the film business for ever. However, his frequent on-screen love interest does not take kindly to this real-life romance. Musical comedy, starring Gene Kelly, Debbie Reynolds, Donald OConnor, Jean Hagen and Millard Mitchell. Songs include Make em Laugh, You Are My Lucky Star and the title number

programme.title: Risky Business (1983)
programme.desc: An upper-class suburban teenager gets involved with a prostitute while his parents are away on holiday, turning the family home into a brothel and jeopardising his plans for the future. Coming-of-age comedy, starring Tom Cruise, Rebecca De Mornay, Bronson Pinchot and Joe Pantoliano

programme.title: This Is Spinal Tap (1984)
programme.desc: An ageing British rock band try to revive their fortunes by embarking on a US tour, with a film-maker on hand to record the mayhem. However, the big comeback soon turns into a series of disasters as tensions between the clueless rockers and their long-suffering manager reach breaking point. Spoof documentary, starring Michael McKean, Christopher Guest, Harry Shearer and Rob Reiner

programme.title: The Brutalist (2025)
programme.desc: When a couple flee Europe in 1947, their new lives in the US are changed by a strange client. Director Brady Corbets drama, starring Adrien Brody, Felicity Jones, Guy Pearce and Joe Alwyn

programme.title: Thelma (2024)
programme.desc: After 93-year-old Thelma is conned by a phone scammer, she embarks on a risky journey across LA with only one thing on her mind - revenge. Comedy, starring June Squibb, Fred Hechinger, Parker Posey, Clark Gregg and in one of his final films, Richard Roundtree

programme.title: The Big Heat (1953)
programme.desc: A scrupulously honest detective investigates after a cop leaves a suicide note detailing corruption in the force and gangland connections, but gets taken off the case when his own wife is killed by the Mob. However, convinced the officers in charge are covering their tracks, he decides to go it alone. Fritz Langs noir crime drama, with Glenn Ford, Gloria Grahame, Lee Marvin and Alexander Scourby

programme.title: The Last Stop In Yuma County (2024)
programme.desc: While stuck at a rural Arizona rest stop, a salesman is thrust into a hostage situation by the arrival of two ruthless bank robbers. Writer/director Francis Galluppis crime thriller, starring Jim Cummings, Faizon Love and Jocelin Donahue

programme.title: The Day of the Jackal (1973)
programme.desc: A group of conspirators contracts the Jackal, a professional hitman, to assassinate President Charles de Gaulle of France. The killer starts to put his painstaking plans into action, creating a new identity, establishing his alibi and commissioning a custom-made weapon, while out-foxing the French police at every turn. Fred Zinnemanns adaptation of Fredericks Forsyth thriller, with Edward Fox, Michael Lonsdale, Alan Badel, Tony Britton and Cyril Cusack

programme.title: Companion (2025)
programme.desc: A billionaires death causes a bloody turn when an AI android built for human companionship goes haywire. Sci-fi horror, starring Jack Quaid, Sophie Thatcher Lukas Gage and Megan Suri

programme.title: Mad Max 2 (1981)
programme.desc: A former cop haunted by his tragic past roams the wasteland of Australia in the aftermath of a nuclear war. He arrives at a besieged settlement and grudgingly helps protect the residents from a horde of marauding bikers who want to get hold of their valuable supply of petrol. Futuristic adventure sequel, starring Mel Gibson, Bruce Spence, Vernon Wells, Emil Minty and Kjell Nilsson

programme.title: The Last Stop In Yuma County (2024)
programme.desc: While stuck at a rural Arizona rest stop, a salesman is thrust into a hostage situation by the arrival of two ruthless bank robbers. Writer/director Francis Galluppis crime thriller, starring Jim Cummings, Faizon Love and Jocelin Donahue

programme.title: Black Bag (2025)
programme.desc: When a spy is suspected of treason, her husband faces the ultimate test - loyalty to his marriage or his country. Director Steven Soderberghs thriller, starring Michael Fassbender, Cate Blanchett and Rege-Jean Page

programme.title: High Plains Drifter (1973)
programme.desc: A mysterious stranger is hired to defend a remote frontier town from three outlaws who are making peoples lives a misery. Although he rids the community of the troublemakers, the residents lives take a turn for the worse as their saviour seizes control of the town and seeks to punish them for their past sins. Western, directed by and starring Clint Eastwood, alongside Verna Bloom and Marianna Hill

programme.title: The Big Heat (1953)
programme.desc: A scrupulously honest detective investigates after a cop leaves a suicide note detailing corruption in the force and gangland connections, but gets taken off the case when his own wife is killed by the Mob. However, convinced the officers in charge are covering their tracks, he decides to go it alone. Fritz Langs noir crime drama, with Glenn Ford, Gloria Grahame, Lee Marvin and Alexander Scourby

programme.title: Weapons (2025)
programme.desc: At 2.17am, 17 children from the class of Justine Gandy run into the night, arms outstretched, never to be seen again. The only child from the class who remains safely in their bed is Alex Lilly. Distraught parent Archer Graff joins other members of the local community in pointing a finger of blame at Ms Gandy for the shocking turn of events. While she pleads innocence, school principal Andrew Marcus seeks answers along with police officer Paul Morgan. Horror, starring Julia Garner, Josh Brolin and Alden Ehrenreich

programme.title: Pillion (2025)
programme.desc: A directionless man is swept off his feet when an enigmatic biker takes him on as his submissive. Director Harry Lightons Bafta-nominated comedy, starring Alexander Skarsgard, Harry Melling and Douglas Hodge

programme.title: Sky Cinema Preview - April 2026
programme.desc: Previews of the films now playing on Sky Cinema, plus other highlights

programme.title: Blue Moon (2025)
programme.desc: Set over the course of one turbulent night in March 1943, Lorenz Hart, the waspish wordsmith responsible for The Lady Is a Tramp and My Funny Valentine, finds his life unravelling on the opening evening of his ex-partners show, Oklahoma! Director Richard Linklaters biographical comedy drama, starring Ethan Hawke, Margaret Qualley, Bobby Cannavale and Andrew Scott

programme.title: Flavia (2025)
programme.desc: Flavia de Luce, an 11-year-old amateur sleuth, investigates a murder at her familys manor house when her father falls under suspicion. Family adventure, starring Molly Belle Wright, Martin Freeman, Jonathan Pryce and Toby Jones

programme.title: The Bad Guys 2 (2025)
programme.desc: Struggling to adjust to their newly minted lives as Good Guys, the Bad Guys are offered one last job by a group of all-female criminals. Animated sequel, featuring the voices of Sam Rockwell, Marc Maron and Craig Robinson

programme.title: Regretting You (2025)
programme.desc: A mother and daughter grapple with whats left after a devastating accident reveals a shocking betrayal and forces them to rediscover themselves. Romantic comedy drama, starring Allison Williams, Mckenna Grace and Dave Franco

programme.title: A Big Bold Beautiful Journey (2025)
programme.desc: New York bachelor David is due to drive to his friends wedding, but a wheel clamp on his vehicle derails those plans. He acquires a new drive from the mysterious Car Rental Company managed by two nameless agents, who are oddly familiar with his dating history. At the wedding, David meets fellow singleton Sarah and squanders an opportunity to dance with her. On the way home, the rental cars GPS asks him if he would like to embark on a big bold beautiful journey. When David agrees, the virtual assistant guides him to Sarah and they follow a winding route between physical doors that open into episodes from their respective pasts. Romantic drama, starring Colin Farrell and Margot Robbie

programme.title: One Battle After Another (2025)
programme.desc: Bob is a washed-up revolutionary who lives in a state of stoned paranoia, with his spirited and self-reliant daughter, Willa. When his evil nemesis resurfaces and Willa goes missing, he scrambles to find her as both battle the consequences of their pasts. Paul Thomas Andersons Oscar-winning action thriller loosely based on Thomas Pynchons novel Vineland, starring Leonardo DiCaprio, an Academy Award-winning Sean Penn, and Benicio del Toro

programme.title: Superman (2025)
programme.desc: Kal-El, one of the last survivors of the planet Krypton, attempts to protect the people of Earth from evil genius Lex Luthor. Superman is assisted by the Justice Gang, comprising Guy Gardner, aka Green Lantern, Kendra Saunders, aka Hawkgirl, Michael Holt, aka Mister Terrific and Rex Mason, aka Metamorpho. Writer/director James Gunns fantasy adventure, starring David Corenswet, Rachel Brosnahan and Nicholas Hoult

programme.title: Roofman (2025)
programme.desc: Former US Army Reserve officer Jeffrey Manchester executes a plan to rob multiple branches of McDonalds. He is eventually captured by police and becomes the first person to escape from Brown Creek Correctional Institution in North Carolina. Jeffrey hides out at a toy shop for several months, and during forays outside the building, he sparks romance with store worker Leigh Wainscott. Comedy drama, starring Channing Tatum, Kirsten Dunst and Peter Dinklage

programme.desc: Former baseball player Henry Hank Thompson foolishly agrees to cat-sit for British neighbour Russ, and walks unwittingly into the middle of a turf war between warring factions. Director Darren Aronofskys comedy thriller, starring Austin Butler, Zoe Kravitz and Matt Smith

The sixth entry in the supernatural horror saga, starring Kaitlyn Santa Juana, Teo Briones and Richard Harmon

programme.desc: After an explosion at a London hotel, three people are swept up in the chaos. As rumours circulate that the blast was a terrorist attack, their story gathers momentum on social media and across the rolling 24-hour news cycle. Writer/director Jim Owens comedy thriller, starring Charlotte Ritchie, Tanya Moodie and Nicholas Asbury

programme.desc: The story of Austrian serial killer Jack Unterweger, who was heralded as an example of successful rehabilitation, only for him to kill again

programme.desc: Series following the work of Britains police dogs and their handlers on armed raids and sieges. programme.desc: A medical student tracks down the hit-and-run driver who has left him for dead, a thief is tempted by a slab of fudge, and a wildlife camera catches burglars in the act

programme.desc: A window cleaner is suspected when money goes missing from an elderly woman with dementia, and a burglar falls asleep at the scene of his crime. Presented by Dominic Littlewood

programme.title: The Proof Is Out There
programme.sub-title: First Bigfoot Photo, Howl of the Beast and UFO at Coronation
programme.desc: The suggestion that a picture taken in the 1890s is the first Bigfoot photo ever. Plus, experts consider whether a recording captured in Pennsylvania is a genuine Bigfoot howl. Also featured is the notion that UFOs are drawn to Powerlines and the claim a photographer inadvertently captured a UFO at the coronation of King Charles III

programme.title: Hitlers Engineers
programme.desc: Hans Kammlers fingerprints can be found all over the Third Reichs most prestigious and deadly engineering projects, including rockets and concentration camps

programme.title: Hitlers Engineers
programme.desc: How the designer of one of the most popular car brands in history, Ferdinand Porsche, would not have seen his success without the support of Adolf Hitler

programme.title: Hitlers Secret Sex Life
programme.desc: The myriad of rumours, theories and disputed historical accounts of Adolf Hitlers sexual psychology, considering how it integrated into his overall twisted psyche. This series addresses various time periods of Hitlers alleged and proven sex life and explores the role sex played in shaping Hitlers behaviour

programme.title: Hitlers Handmaidens
programme.desc: The women who turned Hitler from a rabble-rouser to a politician, training him in the methods of high society to launch him to power. These females helped pioneer the Nazi Party - and voted him in. However, they were soon left behind once he achieved supreme authority

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: Experts investigate ancient mans apparent obsession with building pyramids, and consider whether extraterrestrials may have helped with their construction

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: Experts investigate whether the US military has a secret space programme, as well as evidence suggesting alien races have been in conflict for millennia

programme.title: Alien Files Reopened
programme.desc: The stories behind unusual and unexplained sightings. In 1952, the radar at Andrews Airforce base and Washington National Airport picked up UFOs and two US Air Force F-94 jets streaked over Washington, searching for flying saucers. A week later, it happened again - more UFOs on the radar screen, more jets scrambled over Washington.

programme.title: Titanic: A Dead Reckoning
programme.desc: As the Titanic started to sink in April 1912, another ship came into view, offering her passengers the hope of being rescued. However, despite a fusillade of rockets, the ship turned away. Within two hours, 1,500 people were dead. An American investigation at the time accused the SS Californian, even though the freighter was stationary that night. A British inquiry concurred, keen to shift blame from national failures on lifeboat provision and steamship supervision. However, since Titanics wreck was discovered, the mystery began to unlock, and now, with recently discovered clues, a new suspect has emerged: the SS Mount Temple. This documentary follows a range of experts, using the latest investigative tools, as they examine these new clues and revisit the evidence from 1912 to take a fresh look at the cold case of the 20th century

programme.title: Digging for Britain
programme.desc: How a lobster led archaeologists to the discovery of an 8,000-year-old neolithic settlement and witnessing the excavation of an Iron Age crouched burial at a secret location in Dorset. Also, Naoise Mac Sweeney visits a modern construction site as it gives up the secrets of an Elizabethan playhouse

programme.title: Mysteries from Above
programme.desc: Cameras capture the world from fresh and exhilarating perspectives. This episode features an underwater find from a violent past, a mysterious concrete ghost island and never-before-seen tracks along the seabed

programme.title: Dirty Old Cars
programme.desc: In Minnesota, an almost 100-year-old Model A filled with crickets needs a major overhaul to see its true potential. In Georgia, Knoxy and Wu arent monkeying around when they disinfect a Honda HR-V covered in animal faeces

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Wolfe brothers Mike and Frank venture to South Carolina in search of hidden treasures. Their first stop is a remarkable grocery store frozen in time, offering a glimpse into the past. With their keen eyes for valuable items and a knack for uncovering history, the pair are on a mission to pick the best gems this grocery has to offer. They then pay a visit to Sammy?s classic car paradise - a dream-come-true for car enthusiasts and pickers alike

programme.title: Walking Through History
programme.desc: Tony Robinson takes a four-day trek along the coastline between Plymouth in Devon and Falmouth, learning about the thriving smuggling trade in Cornwall during the late 18th century. The areas tiny secretive harbours, beaches and secluded coves were ideal for illicit imports such as tobacco and brandy, and the business was so huge it threatened the national economy. Along his route, visiting such beauty spots as Lantic Bay and Polperro, he encounters all sorts of reminders of the trade and meets descendants of those involved

programme.title: Walking Through History
programme.desc: Tony Robinson embarks on another expedition through some of Britains most historic landscapes. He begins with a towpath exploration of industrial engineering along the Leeds and Liverpool Canal. Setting off from Liverpool, he takes a three-day walk inland to Wigan, ending at the towns iconic pier as he traces the story of the waterways chaotic construction and its impact on the development of Lancashire

programme.title: Walking Through History
programme.desc: Tony Robinson explores the history of the ancient kingdom on a walk from Melrose in the Scottish Borders to Holy Island off the coast of Northumberland. Over five days, he goes on the trail of one of Northumbrias greatest sons - Saint Cuthbert. Through the Tweed Valley and across the Cheviot Hills, its a journey through a murky history laden with myth. However, by investigating the communities, power bases and landscape of seventh-century Northumbria, Tony aims to understand the pagan land in which Cuthbert spread his simple brand of Celtic Christianity

programme.title: Bradley Walsh: Egypts Cosmic Code
programme.desc: The presenter dives deeper into Egypts mysteries, exploring the Great Sphinx and the underground Serapeum with its precision-cut granite sarcophagi, questioning their purpose and links to the pyramid enigma. Travelling south, he visits the intricately designed Dendera Temple, where hieroglyphs and imagery hint at possible extraterrestrial connections. He concludes at the sprawling Karnak temple complex, marvelling at its monumental engineering, sphinx-lined avenues, and Hatshepsuts towering obelisk - wondering whether its simply a monument or a channel for cosmic energy

programme.title: Police 24/7

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Mr Burns is given six weeks to live, and the town erupts into a party mood. Shocked by their reaction, he decides to take his own life and jumps off a cliff, but fate intervenes and he suffers from a bout of amnesia

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Lisa joins Mensa and inspires the local intelligentsia to take over Springfield. Determined to build a better world, they decide to transform the town into a utopia - but go too far and cause a riot. With the guest voice of Stephen Hawking

programme.title: The Office (US)
programme.desc: Michael is forced to get in touch with his former lovers after contracting an embarrassing ailment - and has to face some upsetting facts about his old relationships. Meanwhile, Andy tries to organise a sexual health seminar in the office. Comedy, starring Steve Carell

programme.title: The Office (US)
programme.desc: Michael, Dwight and Jim spy on a rival salesman who has been beating them to clients - and enlist Merediths help to carry out an undercover surveillance mission. programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: How Munched Is That Birdie in the Window?
programme.desc: After spending weeks nursing an injured pigeon back to health, Bart is left distraught when Santas Little Helper eats his feathered friend. Things go from bad to worse for the mischievous greyhound when a psychiatrist recommends the family finds the dog a new home. Featuring the guest voice of Rachel Weisz

programme.title: Live Betfred Super League
programme.desc: York Knights v Toulouse Olympique (Kick-off 8.00pm). Coverage of the top-flight match at LNER Community Stadium. programme.title: Wildlife Icons
programme.desc: A look at meerkats, which may be small and vulnerable, but what they lack in size, they make up for in tenacity

programme.title: Gangs of Baboon Falls
programme.desc: A look back at how the gangs have fared throughout this bizarre year of lockdown and return to normal

programme.title: Undiscovered Vistas
programme.desc: The powers of fire and ice collide in Iceland, actually Earths largest volcanic island. Take a journey to this country driven by the forces of nature

programme.title: Extreme Africa
programme.desc: The Simien Mountains National Park in Ethiopia, home to some of the rarest creatures on Earth. This film offers a glimpse into life on some of the highest peaks in Africa, in the last stronghold of shaggy, grass-grazing geladas, elusive Simien wolves and horned walia ibex

programme.title: Wild Philippines
programme.desc: Discovering a world shaped by fire and water, as cameras capture Philippine eagles soaring above ancient forests and rare crocodiles lurking below the rivers surface

programme.title: Great Blue Wild
programme.desc: The local economy of Palau relies heavily on eco-tourism. But as this documentary shows, the country is fighting a hard battle against man-made environmental destruction

programme.title: Wild Dogs: Pack vs Pride
programme.desc: Following the wild dog packs of Africa. Roaming with the pups of the Manzi and Kakumbi packs in South Luangwa, Zambia. Snowy faces a hyena before Weka must search for her offspring

programme.title: Funny Girl (1968)
programme.desc: Musical biopic of 1920s singer and comedienne Fanny Brice, who rose from poor beginnings in New Yorks slums to become an overnight star and the toast of Broadway. Her success, however, came at the price of a turbulent private life and an unhappy marriage to a gambler, who grew increasingly jealous of her fame. Starring an Oscar-winning Barbra Streisand, with Omar Sharif, Kay Medford and Walter Pidgeon

programme.title: Billionaire Boys Club (2018)
programme.desc: Led by their financial expert friend Joe Hunt, a group of young men in 1980s Los Angeles hatch a plan to get-rich-quick with a Ponzi scheme. However, the plan ends badly when Hunt and friend Jim Pittman decide to murder investor and con man Ron Levin. Co-writer/director James Coxs drama, starring Ansel Elgort, Taron Egerton and Emma Roberts.

programme.title: Dunkirk (2017)
programme.desc: Allied soldiers from Belgium, the British Empire and France are surrounded by the German army, and face a tense wait for evacuation, during a fierce battle in northern France during the Second World War. Christopher Nolans wartime drama, which he wrote, directed and produced, starring Kenneth Branagh, Tom Hardy, Mark Rylance and Fionn Whitehead

programme.title: Rob Peace (2024)
programme.desc: A young man is torn between his fathers shadowed past and his own promising future. Raised by his devoted mother, Rob Peace risks everything he has worked for to free his imprisoned dad. Drama, starring Chiwetel Ejiofor, who also adapted Jeff Hobbs book and directed, with Jay Will, Camila Cabello and Mary J Blige

programme.title: Funny Girl (1968)
programme.desc: Musical biopic of 1920s singer and comedienne Fanny Brice, who rose from poor beginnings in New Yorks slums to become an overnight star and the toast of Broadway. Her success, however, came at the price of a turbulent private life and an unhappy marriage to a gambler, who grew increasingly jealous of her fame. Starring an Oscar-winning Barbra Streisand, with Omar Sharif, Kay Medford and Walter Pidgeon

programme.title: Saturday Night (2024)
programme.desc: During the build-up to the first broadcast of Saturday Night Live on October 11th 1975, a group of young comedians and writers prepare to change television forever. Comedy, starring Gabriel LaBelle, Rachel Sennott, Cory Michael Smith and Ella Hunt

programme.title: The Glorias (2020)
programme.desc: The story of feminist icon Gloria Steinems itinerant childhood and its influence on her life as a writer, activist and organiser for womens rights worldwide. Director Julie Taymors biopic, starring Julianne Moore, Alicia Vikander, Ryan Kiera Armstrong and Lulu Wilson, who all portray Steinem at different points in her life. With Janelle Monae and Bette Midler

programme.title: Widow Clicquot (2023)
programme.desc: In the late 18th century, a group of women create the Veuve Clicquot champagne business. Drama, starring Haley Bennett, Tom Sturridge and Sam Riley

programme.title: The Survivor
programme.desc: Drama based on the story of Harry Haft, a survivor of the Auschwitz concentration camp who boxed his fellow inmates to stay alive. Haunted by memories and guilt, he attempts to use high-profile fights against boxing legends like Rocky Marciano as a way to find his first love again. Directed by Barry Levinson and starring Ben Foster, John Leguizamo, Peter Sarsgaard and Danny DeVito

programme.title: Mollys Game (2017)
programme.desc: Fact-based drama about Molly Bloom, an Olympic-class skier who ran the worlds most exclusive high-stakes poker game for a decade before being arrested in the middle of the night by FBI agents wielding automatic weapons. Her players included Hollywood royalty, sports stars, business titans and finally - unbeknownst to her - the Russian Mob. Directed by The West Wing creator Aaron Sorkin, and starring Jessica Chastain, Idris Elba and Kevin Costner

programme.title: Jackie (2016)
programme.desc: Following the assassination of her husband, President John F Kennedy, Jacqueline Kennedy battles with grief and trauma to regain her faith, console her children, and define JFKs legacy. Director Pablo Larrains Bafta-winning drama, starring Natalie Portman, Peter Sarsgaard and Greta Gerwig. Mica Levi provided the Oscar-nominated score

programme.title: Widow Clicquot (2023)
programme.desc: In the late 18th century, a group of women create the Veuve Clicquot champagne business. Drama, starring Haley Bennett, Tom Sturridge and Sam Riley

programme.title: Detroit (2017)
programme.desc: A group of rogue police officers responds to a complaint with apparent retribution rather than justice in mind, launching a raid on a group of African-Americans. Public anger reaches a peak after the incident, as relationships sour with authority. Fact-based drama set during the 1967 Detroit riots, starring John Boyega, Anthony Mackie and Algee Smith

programme.desc: Sigmund Freud invites CS Lewis to debate the existence of God. Drama, starring Anthony Hopkins, Matthew Goode and Liv Lisa Fries

programme.title: The United States Vs. Billie Holiday (2021)
programme.desc: The acclaimed singer is targeted by the Federal Department of Narcotics with an undercover sting operation led by Federal Agent Jimmy Fletcher, with who she had a tumultuous affair. Director Lee Daniels biopic based on the novel by Johann Hari, starring Andra Day, Trevante Rhodes and Natasha Lyonne

programme.title: I, Tonya (2017)
programme.desc: Ice skater Tonya Harding rises through the ranks at the US figure skating championships, but her future in the sport is thrown into question by a shocking incident after her ex-husband steps in. Director Craig Gillespies comedy biopic, starring Margot Robbie, Sebastian Stan, and Allison Janney, who won a Bafta and an Oscar for her performance

programme.title: Save the Cinema (2022)
programme.desc: Drama telling the true story of Liz Evans from Carmarthen, south-west Wales, who started a campaign in the 1990s to save the towns Lyric Cinema. With the help of local politician Richard Goodridge, Liz manages to persuade Steven Spielberg to show a premiere of Jurassic Park at the Lyric. Starring Samantha Morton, Tom Felton and Jonathan Pryce

programme.title: Lee (2023)
programme.desc: American fashion model-turned-war photographer Lee Miller is determined to document the truth of the Nazi regime, and in spite of the odds stacked against female correspondents, she captures some of the most important images of the Second World War. Fact-based drama, starring Kate Winslet, Andy Samberg, Alexander Skarsgard and Marion Cotillard

programme.title: Marú inár Measc
programme.desc: The case of 17-year-old Daniel McAnaspie who, in 2010, was murdered by Trevor Noone and Richard Dekker gruesomely by garden shears. Daniel became the first-known child to be murdered while under the care of the HSE and his case raised questions of the States responsibilities for those in its care. Daniels murder trial made history when Dekker went on trial twice for the same crime and this story went all the way to the Supreme Court

programme.title: Bailte
programme.desc: Síle Nic Chonaonaigh visits the coastal village of Leitreach Ard in Carna, Conamara. Situated on the eastern side of Cuan na Beirtrí Buí with panoramic views of Roundstone and the Beanna Beola mountain range, Síle finds a progressive community keen to continue their maritime traditions and pastimes. As well as meeting boatbuilders, fishermen, yoga instructors and members of a newly formed sailing club she also meets the renowned sean-nos singer Johnny Mháirtín Learaí Mac Donnchadha

programme.title: Grand Tours of Scotlands Lochs
programme.desc: Landing at Glenuig, Paul Murton makes his way inland to Loch Moidart and MacDonald country, walking the old coffin road, which was used for centuries by funeral parties, taking their dead to a sacred isle. On the track Paul meets a trials bike enthusiast and learns the secrets of a dabbing coat before landing off the Green Isle, where he rings a 1,100-year-old bell for the dead. Taking a boat north, Paul sails up Loch Shiel to Glenfinnan where Bonnie Prince Charlie officially began his rising to reclaim the throne for the Stuart Dynasty. From a forgotten monument that commemorates this event, Paul heads back to the coast and Loch Ailort, where he learns how to knife fight before taking a trip across the loch to a deserted community on the roadless Ardnish peninsula

programme.title: Vendetta for the Saint (1969)
programme.desc: The suave anti-hero investigates a murder in Naples, but ends up facing the Sicilian Mafia. Action adventure, starring Roger Moore, Ian Hendry and Rosemary Dexter

programme.title: Come Play With Me (1977)
programme.desc: A nurse at a health farm takes over running the establishment, and comes up with her own range of sexual treatments. Meanwhile, two forgers on the run hide out at the farm. Sex comedy, starring Mary Millington, Alfie Bass and Irene Handl

programme.title: Country House Auction
programme.desc: Egyptologist Dr Chris gets his hands on an inscribed Egyptian amulet and gives trainee auctioneer James a masterclass in ancient signs and symbols. A historical silver pin cushion, which was once owned by a leading lady of the Irish Arts and Crafts movement, piques the interest of competing buyers. Plus, auctioneer James gets up close and personal with the inner workings of some valuable watches

programme.title: My Floating Home
programme.desc: Mark Evans meets more people who aspire to live in their ultimate waterside dream home. Simon and Mary Sparrow live on a barge in Beccles, Suffolk, with their son Nate and their two cats. The Sparrows have been running a boatyard for nearly 10 years, specialising in refurbishing and renting out floating homes to holidaymakers. Now theyre designing and building a new, one-of-a-kind floating home for themselves - a futuristic-looking floating pod, drawing on a budget of £70,000

programme.title: Great British Food
programme.desc: Tom Norrington-Davies goes in search of oysters in Falmouth, and prepares shin of beef slow-cooked in stout with Yorkshire pudding

programme.title: Great British Food
programme.desc: Tom Norrington-Davies cooks roast chicken and visits Posh Chick, a business run by three young siblings

programme.title: Garden Rescue
programme.desc: David and Alice have their hands full with toddler twins Beatrix and Martha. They moved in a year and a half ago, but have not had the time or energy to devote to their new garden. Low maintenance is key for any busy family, and the couple would like advice on how best to maintain the mature hedging which surrounds the garden. The old deck is rotten and slippery and theres an unusual fence separating the garden from a garden room used by the previous owners as a separate annexe. Theyve got £5,500 for designers Charlie Dimmock and Chris Hull to bring both parts of the garden back together as a family garden in which the twins can play whilst David and Alice make the most of the evening sun at the back of the garden

programme.title: Garden Rescue
programme.desc: Chris Hull and Lee Burkhill redesign Iqbal and Pardeeps empty garden in Oldbury, Worcestershire, to reflect their love of sport and the outdoors while also providing a space for their teenage children to spend time with their friends or for family parties

programme.title: Love Your Garden
programme.desc: Alan Titchmarsh and his team come to the aid of nonagenarian Roberta and her 86-year-old best friend and carer Enid, who live together in a retirement bungalow in Wiveliscombe, Somerset. Originally from Liverpool, the two plucky pensioners have helped each other out countless times throughout the course of their friendship, which has lasted seven decades. However, they now find themselves trapped in their home by a treacherous slope in their garden, so Alan plans to set them free by designing a future-proofed garden in a vintage style

programme.title: Rick Steins Food Stories
programme.desc: Rick explores Glasgows multi-cultural food scene, tucking into Korean and Pakistani dishes and finding out how Italian food became part of the citys fabric. He also discovers chocolate made by an artisan chocolatier, using it to make profiteroles. Plus, he teams up with his son to cook a family favourite, osso buco

programme.title: The Wild Gardener
programme.desc: Colin Stafford-Johnson continues to transform his childhood garden into a haven for wildlife. Rain finally arrives and the garden is transformed - ponds burst with dragonflies and damselflies, meadows explode in flower and the much-awaited hum of life can be heard everywhere. Colin Stafford-Johnson encounters his first nest of the year, a real milestone for the project and he explores the life cycle of the much overlooked solitary bees

programme.title: Garden Rescue
programme.desc: Chris Hull and Lee Burkhill redesign Iqbal and Pardeeps empty garden in Oldbury, Worcestershire, to reflect their love of sport and the outdoors while also providing a space for their teenage children to spend time with their friends or for family parties

programme.title: Country House Auction
programme.desc: A mysterious pencil sketch of an anonymous couple by acclaimed artist Sean Keating enchants rival bidders Helen and David, but only auctioneer Michaels hammer can seal its fate. Gloster house owners and self-confessed auction addicts Tom and Mary are on the hunt for some antique gems for their 300-year-old home, while cabinetmaker Kieran restores a classic Victorian Cheval mirror for the sale

programme.title: Garden Rescue
programme.desc: Charlie Dimmock and Chris Hull transform Lindas front garden full of weeds and cobble to give her a Japanese-inspired garden that exudes elegance and drama and is a much better view for when shes staring out the window while working from home

programme.title: Intimate Games (1976)
programme.desc: A professor instructs the members of his class to research a project on sexual fantasies, but gets more than he bargained for as the students set out to broaden their horizons in some surprising directions. Comedy, starring George Baker and Felicity Devonshire

programme.title: Cruel Passion (1977)
programme.desc: Two sisters are expelled from a nunnery and are plunged into a life of debauchery. While one embraces her new lifestyle, the other is desperate to cling to her old morality and sees a hope of salvation in a mysterious aristocrat who harbours a hidden dark side. Historical drama based on the novel Justine by the Marquis de Sade, starring Koo Stark and Martin Potter

programme.title: Country House Auction

programme.title: My Floating Home
programme.desc: Alan and Val McCoy put their life savings on the line to make their dream of living on water come true, entrusting a boat builder to make them their dream narrow boat floating home. The couple have been together for 11 years and now that theyre retired, theyve decided that owning a narrow boat could be a unique way to be near their families - all of whom live along the canal system across the Midlands and north-west England

programme.title: Close Calls: On Camera
programme.desc: Alex Jones presents remarkable stories of people who have been on the brink of disaster, with much of their experience caught on camera. In this edition, she recalls how a British student became lost and without food for eight agonising days in a remote part of Turkey and recounts how an amateur racing driver crashed at high speed during a competition - with his vehicle hurtling down a ditch

programme.title: Close Calls: On Camera
programme.desc: A powerboat racers vessel flips into the air while travelling at more than 130mph and a man wakes to find his girlfriend having a cardiac arrest. Alex Jones presents

programme.title: Close Calls: On Camera
programme.desc: Alex Jones presents footage and recordings of more near misses. Five fishermen are swept off their sinking ship into the Atlantic Ocean as a helicopter winch man tries desperately to pluck them from the sea. There is also coverage of the moment an 11-year-old boy performs CPR on his motionless father

programme.title: Close Calls: On Camera
programme.desc: Alex Jones presents footage of more near misses, including a jockey leading a race who fell unconscious from his horse right into the path of the oncoming field

programme.title: Death in Paradise

Neville prepares to make a huge next step in his life, and a familiar face returns

programme.title: The Mentalist
programme.desc: The murder of a trainer at a baseball academy leads Cho, Lisbon and Jane to suspect the crime could have been motivated by money. The team learns his wife is sole beneficiary of a substantial life insurance payout, and his business partner stood to take the controlling share of their company - but a lack of evidence hampers the investigation - until the consultant follows a hunch. Jane also has a flashback when he is knocked out, leading him to remember working at a circus with his father. Guest starring Jude Ciccolella

programme.title: Hudson and Rex
programme.desc: Charlie and Rex are in deep water after a university rower is shot by a sniper during team practice

programme.title: My Life Is Murder
programme.desc: Lucy Lawless stars as Alexa Crowe, a cop-turned-private investigator called upon to provide professional support and advice to ex-colleague and long-time friend DI Kieran Hussey. A wealthy socialite dies in suspicious circumstances, leaving her entire fortune to her cat, and Alexa must investigate a heady world of high society gossip to uncover the truth

programme.desc: A passenger disappears from a flight to Dominica, only to be found dead in Saint Marie, while the pilot and flight attendant deny even seeing the victim on the plane. programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: The Kembleford Ramblers annual outing takes a tragic turn when the local lord is found strangled, so the cleric gets his walking boots on to solve the crime. Murder mystery, starring Mark Williams

programme.title: The Mentalist
programme.desc: A couple are murdered on their way to a high-school reunion, prompting Patrick to investigate the untrustworthy characters at the event. He connects the incident to a past case of bullying, and when he notices that Rigsby bears a resemblance to one of the victims, he tries to lure the killer out with an audacious scheme. Crime drama, starring Simon Baker, Robin Tunney and Tim Kang

programme.title: Hudson and Rex
programme.desc: Cultures clash when the death of a Parisian culinary journalist has Charlie and Rex partnering with a French detective

programme.title: My Life Is Murder
programme.desc: Alexa investigates the death of a tough tennis coach, but shes not the only one on the case. A glamorous private investigator is determined to solve it first

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: Richard Poole meets up with a group of old university friends who have arrived on the island for a reunion, only for tragedy to strike when the man who has solved so many murders becomes the victim. Faced with such a sensitive crime, the commissioner quickly drafts in another British inspector to help the team get to the bottom of the mystery. It soon becomes clear that the newcomer, Humphrey Goodman, is just as eccentric as Poole - but he is also just as bright, and wastes no time questioning the partygoers, all of whom are prime suspects, while pondering the biggest mystery of all - how did the culprit commit the crime in full view of all the other guests? Kris Marshall joins the cast, with Ben Miller, Sara Martins and Danny John-Jules

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: The islands commerce minister is shot dead in his home, and with the incident coming shortly after the exposure of a scandalous affair - not to mention a suicide note at the scene - it looks like an open-and-shut case. But Humphrey isnt convinced and believes someone else was responsible for the killing, whittling down the possible suspects to leave his betrayed wife, his son and his mistress in the frame. The rest of the team struggles to see past the physical evidence, which still suggests he took his own life - and then matters are complicated even further when Camille gets a blast from the past

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: When Lady Felicias home comes under threat, Father Brown is forced to seek help from an unlikely ally. Mark Williams and Nancy Carroll star

Kris Marshall joins the cast, with Ben Miller, Sara Martins and Danny John-Jules

programme.title: My Life Is Murder
programme.desc: Lucy Lawless stars as Alexa Crowe, a cop-turned-private investigator called upon to provide professional support and advice to ex-colleague and long-time friend DI Kieran Hussey. A wealthy socialite dies in suspicious circumstances, leaving her entire fortune to her cat, and Alexa must investigate a heady world of high society gossip to uncover the truth

programme.desc: Crime drama following a Newfoundland cop (Allan Hawco) exiled to Saint-Pierre et Miquelon, where picturesque isolation masks dangerous secrets. New-to-town Inspector Donny Fitz Fitzpatrick joins forces with local detective Genevieve Archambault (Josephine Jobert) to solve the murder of a back-to-nature group leader

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: A visit to Chummys holiday camp leads to another murder mystery for the sleuthing cleric. Mark Williams stars, with a guest appearance by Ted Robbins

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: The islands commerce minister is shot dead in his home, and with the incident coming shortly after the exposure of a scandalous affair - not to mention a suicide note at the scene - it looks like an open-and-shut case. But Humphrey isnt convinced and believes someone else was responsible for the killing, whittling down the possible suspects to leave his betrayed wife, his son and his mistress in the frame. The rest of the team struggles to see past the physical evidence, which still suggests he took his own life - and then matters are complicated even further when Camille gets a blast from the past

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: A zombie movie being filmed on the island ends in real-life horror when a stand-in is poisoned - and new detective inspector Humphrey soon deduces that the unfortunate victim was not the killers intended target. He believes the culprit was after lead actress Lexi Cunningham, but the murder plot went wrong. The Caribbean cops focus their attention on three suspects - film director Carl Collins, screenwriter Arnold Finch and production assistant Susie Jenkins. But why would any of them want the star dead? Michelle Ryan, Peter Davison and Hannah Tointon guest star

programme.title: Worlds Most Dangerous Roads
programme.desc: Comedians Phill Jupitus and Marcus Brigstocke head to Bolivia for a high-altitude trip, first driving along the infamous Road of Death, only to find themselves deep in bandit country. Disorientation takes them by surprise as they have to navigate Salar de Uyuni - a salt lake so vast that Buzz Aldrin could see it from space. Their goal is the ancient mountain city of Potosi, whose silver mines financed the Spanish empire in the 16th century and which is almost 5,000 metres above sea level

programme.title: Special Ops: To Catch a Criminal
programme.desc: City of London Police begin a dangerous high-speed chase when the UKs most notorious phone snatcher races into the Square Mile on an illegal electric bike

programme.title: Highland Cops
programme.desc: The work of Police Scotlands Highlands and Islands division. A bushcraft expert is reported missing in remote Sutherland and officers battle to find which route he took in order to locate him before a blizzard sets in. Narrated by James Cosmo

programme.title: Aussie Road Train Truckers
programme.desc: Scotty and Shaun travel to one of the most remote cattle stations in the world, Glenn and Dave attempt a cement operation, and Brownie races to beat the rain

programme.title: Rick Steins Cornwall
programme.desc: Rick visits Tintagel, Cornwalls most mythical place, which was an important trading port with Europe and the birthplace of perhaps Britains greatest legend - the tale of King Arthur. He also learns how the Methodists were important to Cornwall, and how they would cook a rather unusual bun during feast days, and meets a family on the Roseland Peninsula who are continuing the surprisingly ancient tradition of growing an exotic spice - saffron

programme.title: Rick Steins Cornwall
programme.desc: Rick explores the rich and diverse history of West Penwith, the farthest point west in mainland Britain. He visits Lamorna Cove, made famous through song and art, and the Unesco-protected tin and copper mining area of Botallack, where he talks to a mining explorer. The chef also follows an ancient track in search of Cornwalls oldest building and reveals how, as a young lad on the Lizard Peninsula, he fell in love for the first time and tasted his first French fish stew - known as a bouillabaisse

programme.title: Special Ops: To Catch a Criminal
programme.desc: Counter Terrorism Policing foil an Islamist terror plot, and the CPS Special Crime Unit bring those responsible for a fatal crash on the M62 to justice

programme.title: Special Ops: To Catch a Criminal
programme.desc: Manchester police take down a gang of teen car thieves, and the Serious Fraud Office unravels a 400-million-pound global fraud in the steel industry

programme.title: The Boat That Guy Built
programme.desc: Guy Martin enlists the help of a friend as he gives his narrowboat a makeover. They learn about designer William Morris while applying one of his wallpaper patterns, and try their hand at painting and traditional decorative treatments. Guy then heads to a Macclesfield mill where he is taught how to weave silk for interior decorations

programme.title: The Boat That Guy Built
programme.desc: To celebrate the end of the project, Guy Martin shows off the renovated boat at a party, learns how to prepare Victoria sponge, and shoots a commemorative Victorian-style portrait with a 150-year-old camera. However, the maiden voyage is hampered by bad water and weather conditions, as the narrowboat struggles through inch-thick ice

programme.title: Highland Cops
programme.desc: The hunt for a missing person in the vast rural area around Golspie sees search dog handler PC Adam Naismith and German shepherd Wolf deployed, but the case takes a turn when police discover he is wanted for questioning by another force. Inverness CID carry out a major operation against county lines drug dealers. On Skye, Sgt Gordon McKay comes to the aid of a stranded tourist with a nasty hillwalking injury

programme.title: Highland Cops
programme.desc: When an experienced hiker fails to return from the top of a mountain on Skye, a multi-agency response involving the police, mountain rescue and the coastguard is launched. In Glencoe, a campervan driver reports his windscreen has been shattered by what he believes to be a bullet, while a drugs warrant in Dingwall exposes a concealed attic containing evidence of a cannabis-growing operation

programme.title: Aussie Road Train Truckers
programme.desc: Scotty takes on a time-critical job, Glenn blows a tyre in the middle of nowhere, and Jake races 2,000 kilometres to hit a lucrative cattle-load deadline

programme.title: Rick Steins Cornwall
programme.desc: As the chefs Cornish odyssey nears its end, he takes a break in the city of Truro, where he discovers an unusual ghost story and tours the magnificent cathedral. He also meets a family passionate about offal, who prepare Rick a meal of pickled ox tongue and beef heart tacos, and in the countys most northerly parish he tells the story of an eccentric vicar who would retrieve the bodies from nearby shipwrecks and bury them in his church graveyard

programme.title: Rick Steins Cornwall
programme.desc: The chef champions the food, history, music, art and culture of the county, beginning by reflecting on his early days running a nightclub in Padstow. He goes for a bracing dip in Budes sea pool, while in Sennen Cove off Lands End, Rick braves the notoriously wild Atlantic waters to learn about the ancient fishing method of handlining

programme.title: Special Ops: To Catch a Criminal
programme.desc: The return of the documentary series that follows the investigations of specialist units within UK police forces created to crack the toughest of cases, from cyber heists, romance fraud and people trafficking to drug rings and murder. With access to some of Britain?s most talented detectives, the series explores the investigations, methods and evidence that has put some of the UK?s most dangerous criminals behind bars. Each episode features evidential police footage as they take on criminals and hunt for clues to solve the cases. The series offers a first-hand experience of the work of the elite units on the front line while witnessing their bravery, skill and compassion amid tragedy and loss. The series also discovers how detectives operate in the interview room, how forensics bring a case into focus, and how expert CCTV and digital analysis create timelines and evidence to catch a criminal, and the impact these crimes have on the communities they serve. The suspicious demise of a woman at the cult-like Wiltshire retreat of a self-proclaimed healer sparks a global investigation and a link to a death in Australia

programme.title: Special Ops: To Catch a Criminal
programme.desc: A routine visit by the RSPCA to a house in Chigwell in Essex uncovers an underground UK dog-fighting gang operating on a global scale

programme.title: Speed with Guy Martin
programme.sub-title: Speed with Guy Martin: F1 Challenge
programme.desc: The motorcycle racer joins a pit crew during the 2017 Belgian Grand Prix, providing behind the scenes insight into the world of Formula One. Guy has to work on the split second timing that allows a team to change four tyres in 1.92 seconds, with each individual mechanic as many as 34 different actions without getting in each others way, and also takes on the most dangerous job on the crew - stepping in front of speeding vehicles to remove tyres as soon as they stop

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Paddy McGuiness, Chris Harris and Freddie Flintoff go on a road trip in a trio of affordable second-hand convertibles. Chris puts the Ariel Atom through its paces and Freddie goes bungee jumping off a dam in an old Rover

programme.title: The Boat That Guy Built
programme.desc: Guy Martin enlists the help of a friend as he gives his narrowboat a makeover. They learn about designer William Morris while applying one of his wallpaper patterns, and try their hand at painting and traditional decorative treatments. Guy then heads to a Macclesfield mill where he is taught how to weave silk for interior decorations

programme.title: The Boat That Guy Built
programme.desc: To celebrate the end of the project, Guy Martin shows off the renovated boat at a party, learns how to prepare Victoria sponge, and shoots a commemorative Victorian-style portrait with a 150-year-old camera. However, the maiden voyage is hampered by bad water and weather conditions, as the narrowboat struggles through inch-thick ice

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Paddy McGuinness and Freddie Flintoff go on a jungle adventure in Borneo with the Gurkhas, in a pair of rare but very cheap old cars. Back in the studio, Chris Harris gets behind the wheel of the worlds most luxurious SUV, and the gang is joined by Bob Mortimer

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Freddie Flintoff heads to Iceland to compete in the worlds maddest motorsport, while Paddy McGuinness gets to grips with the latest Toyota Supra. Chris Harris investigates the story of the Lotus 79, arguably the most beautiful F1 car of all time

programme.title: The Hairy Bikers: Mums Know Best
programme.desc: Si King and Dave Myers investigate the nations favourite pre-bedtime meals, discovering a recipe for a Portuguese take on fish and chips. They also examine how to make a salmon curry, and learn the formula for creating the perfect meat and potato pie

programme.title: Rick Steins Cornwall
programme.desc: Rick visits Tintagel, Cornwalls most mythical place, which was an important trading port with Europe and the birthplace of perhaps Britains greatest legend - the tale of King Arthur. He also learns how the Methodists were important to Cornwall, and how they would cook a rather unusual bun during feast days, and meets a family on the Roseland Peninsula who are continuing the surprisingly ancient tradition of growing an exotic spice - saffron

programme.title: Rick Steins Cornwall
programme.desc: Rick explores the rich and diverse history of West Penwith, the farthest point west in mainland Britain. He visits Lamorna Cove, made famous through song and art, and the Unesco-protected tin and copper mining area of Botallack, where he talks to a mining explorer. The chef also follows an ancient track in search of Cornwalls oldest building and reveals how, as a young lad on the Lizard Peninsula, he fell in love for the first time and tasted his first French fish stew - known as a bouillabaisse

programme.title: Rick Steins Cornwall
programme.desc: As the chefs Cornish odyssey nears its end, he takes a break in the city of Truro, where he discovers an unusual ghost story and tours the magnificent cathedral. He also meets a family passionate about offal, who prepare Rick a meal of pickled ox tongue and beef heart tacos, and in the countys most northerly parish he tells the story of an eccentric vicar who would retrieve the bodies from nearby shipwrecks and bury them in his church graveyard

programme.title: Rick Steins Cornwall
programme.desc: The chef champions the food, history, music, art and culture of the county, beginning by reflecting on his early days running a nightclub in Padstow. He goes for a bracing dip in Budes sea pool, while in Sennen Cove off Lands End, Rick braves the notoriously wild Atlantic waters to learn about the ancient fishing method of handlining

programme.title: Special Ops: To Catch a Criminal
programme.desc: The return of the documentary series that follows the investigations of specialist units within UK police forces created to crack the toughest of cases, from cyber heists, romance fraud and people trafficking to drug rings and murder. With access to some of Britain?s most talented detectives, the series explores the investigations, methods and evidence that has put some of the UK?s most dangerous criminals behind bars. Each episode features evidential police footage as they take on criminals and hunt for clues to solve the cases. The series offers a first-hand experience of the work of the elite units on the front line while witnessing their bravery, skill and compassion amid tragedy and loss. The series also discovers how detectives operate in the interview room, how forensics bring a case into focus, and how expert CCTV and digital analysis create timelines and evidence to catch a criminal, and the impact these crimes have on the communities they serve. The suspicious demise of a woman at the cult-like Wiltshire retreat of a self-proclaimed healer sparks a global investigation and a link to a death in Australia

programme.title: Special Ops: To Catch a Criminal
programme.desc: A routine visit by the RSPCA to a house in Chigwell in Essex uncovers an underground UK dog-fighting gang operating on a global scale

programme.title: Speed with Guy Martin
programme.sub-title: Speed with Guy Martin: F1 Challenge
programme.desc: The motorcycle racer joins a pit crew during the 2017 Belgian Grand Prix, providing behind the scenes insight into the world of Formula One. Guy has to work on the split second timing that allows a team to change four tyres in 1.92 seconds, with each individual mechanic as many as 34 different actions without getting in each others way, and also takes on the most dangerous job on the crew - stepping in front of speeding vehicles to remove tyres as soon as they stop

programme.title: A Very British Murder with Lucy Worsley
programme.desc: In the second programme, the historian explores how science and detection influenced the popular culture of murder during Victorian times. Writers including Charles Dickens and Wilkie Collins were fascinated by grisly crimes, and the literary genre that came out of it captured the imagination of readers. The presenter also reveals that when Jack the Ripper began his reign of terror in London at the same time Robert Louis Stevensons Dr Jekyll and Mr Hyde was published, the idea of the serial killer was introduced to the British public

programme.title: Agatha Christie: Lucy Worsley on the Mystery Queen
programme.desc: On the evening of December 3, 1926, Agatha Christie left her home in Sunningdale, Berkshire, in her Morris Cowley. Ten days later, Agatha was discovered in a hotel in Harrogate, claiming to have lost her memory. Lucy Worsley delves into this traumatic, watershed moment in Christies life. She visits the key locations, from the chalk pit where Agatha crashed her car to Abney Hall, the grand house where she took refuge (and which would inspire several of her books)

programme.title: Agatha Christie: Lucy Worsley on the Mystery Queen
programme.desc: In 1930, recovering from a personal crisis, Agatha Christie fell in love with and married Max Mallowan. This relationship, and the security it brought, saw Agatha enter the most prolific and successful chapter of her career. This would be the period in which Agatha penned some of her most famous and enduring bestsellers, including Murder on the Orient Express. Lucy follows in Agathas footsteps to discover the roots of these works and explores how, in later life, Agatha achieved global celebrity - but remained very much the anonymous observer, hiding in plain sight

programme.title: A Very British Murder with Lucy Worsley
programme.desc: An examination of the dark history behind Britains fascination with murder, beginning with historian and curator Lucy Worsley exploring how notorious killings were transformed into popular entertainment in the first half of the 19th century

programme.title: A Very British Murder with Lucy Worsley
programme.desc: In the second programme, the historian explores how science and detection influenced the popular culture of murder during Victorian times. Writers including Charles Dickens and Wilkie Collins were fascinated by grisly crimes, and the literary genre that came out of it captured the imagination of readers. The presenter also reveals that when Jack the Ripper began his reign of terror in London at the same time Robert Louis Stevensons Dr Jekyll and Mr Hyde was published, the idea of the serial killer was introduced to the British public

programme.title: Agatha Christie: Lucy Worsley on the Mystery Queen
programme.desc: On the evening of December 3, 1926, Agatha Christie left her home in Sunningdale, Berkshire, in her Morris Cowley. Ten days later, Agatha was discovered in a hotel in Harrogate, claiming to have lost her memory. Lucy Worsley delves into this traumatic, watershed moment in Christies life. She visits the key locations, from the chalk pit where Agatha crashed her car to Abney Hall, the grand house where she took refuge (and which would inspire several of her books)

programme.title: Great Coastal Railway Journeys
programme.desc: The latest stage of Michael Portillos trek takes him past lochs and castles on the Far North Line to Britains northernmost railway station at Thurso. From Lairg on the banks of Loch Shin, Michael heads for a secret conservation area in the 18-mile-long loch to track down one of Scotlands most elusive and endangered species, the freshwater pearl mussel

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Martin Clunes: Islands of America
programme.desc: The actor arrives in New York to explore Manhattan Island, and its Empire State Building, from where he can see the citys 500 miles of coastline and more than 40 islands. He later takes the ferry to Ellis Island, which opened in 1892 as an immigration centre for those arriving in the US by sea. Following a trip to Coney Island, home to the iconic amusement park, he explores Marthas Vineyard more than 200 miles away, where Jaws was made. Martin ends his trip in Maine, Americas most easterly state, with hundreds of islands off its coast

programme.title: Sue Perkins: Along the US-Mexico Border
programme.desc: Part one of two. The comedian travels along one of the worlds most contentious borders, visiting places in America and Mexico to find out what life is like on both sides. Sue starts her journey at the western end of the border in the Mexican city of Tijuana, where she helps Honduran volunteers building a hostel for fellow refugees fleeing violence in their country

programme.title: Sue Perkins: Along the US-Mexico Border
programme.desc: Part two of two. Sue visits the city of Juarez, which adjoins El Paso on the other side of the border, the two effectively forming a single large city spreading across two nations. A 57-mile section of border wall runs through the two cities, but does not stop thousands of people coming and going across every day. Sue confronts her fear of horses to try out a Mexican form of dressage and meets a woman living in the US who has been separated from her husband, who is not legally allowed to enter the US

programme.title: Frozen Planet
programme.desc: David Attenborough investigates what rising temperatures will mean for people and wildlife in the polar regions, and how changes there could affect the rest of the planet. He discovers polar bears in the Arctic are going hungry as the sea ice they hunt on disappears, and accompanies scientists studying waterfalls of meltwater in Greenland that are leading to a rise in global sea levels. From the Antarctic there are images of the break-up of the Wilkins Ice Shelf, which covered an area the size of Jamaica

programme.title: Doctor Who
programme.sub-title: Death to the Daleks - Part One
programme.desc: The TARDIS is diverted to the barren planet Exxilon where the Doctor discovers the Daleks are searching for a cure to a space plague

programme.title: Doctor Who
programme.sub-title: Death to the Daleks - Part Two
programme.desc: Classic British sci-fi adventure starring Jon Pertwee. The Doctor forms an unlikely alliance with the Daleks to mine the parrinium only to come under attack from the Exxilons

programme.title: Doctor Who
programme.sub-title: Death to the Daleks - Part Three
programme.desc: Classic British sci-fi adventure starring Jon Pertwee. The Doctor and Sarah meet with Bellal, who helps them evade the Daleks and explains the origin of the city

programme.title: Doctor Who
programme.sub-title: Death to the Daleks - Part Four
programme.desc: British sci-fi adventure starring Jon Pertwee. The Doctor and Bellal penetrate the citys defences while Sarah and Jill try to stop the Daleks from escaping with the parrinium

programme.title: Doctor Who
programme.sub-title: Genesis of the Daleks - Part One
programme.desc: Classic sci-fi adventure starring Tom Baker. The Doctor and his companions are dispatched by the Time Lords to the planet Skaro to prevent the creation of the nefarious Daleks

programme.title: Doctor Who
programme.sub-title: Genesis of the Daleks - Part Two
programme.desc: Classic British sci-fi adventure starring Tom Baker. The Doctor and Harry are taken to a bunker where Davros is preparing to demonstrate the Daleks and Sarah is made a slave

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Rise of the Nazis
programme.desc: The documentary examines the actions of Hitler and his inner circle as the Third Reich faced collapse in the final weeks of the Second World War. Germany was losing the war but Hitler refused to surrender, instead pursuing a policy of Total War, which played out as a psychological drama within his inner circle

programme.title: Rise of the Nazis
programme.desc: At the end of March 1945, Nazi Germany is on the brink of collapse and with Berlin under daily bombardment, Hitler permanently retreated to his bunker, a series of 30 cramped rooms under the Reich Chancellery, where night and day merge into one. As his life becomes increasingly bizarre, Hitler and Joseph Goebbels look for signs from German folklore that fate will intervene

programme.title: Rise of the Nazis
programme.desc: By April 1945 most of Germany was occupied by invading Allied forces, with the two-million strong Soviet army just a mile from Hitlers hiding place In Berlin. With the Nazi regime disintegrating, most of Hitlers deputies were busy making plans to try to survive the end of the war and only his most die-hard loyalists stay by his side

programme.title: Rise of the Nazis
programme.desc: The documentary examines the actions of Hitler and his inner circle as the Third Reich faced collapse in the final weeks of the Second World War. programme.title: Lucy Worsley Investigates
programme.desc: The historian examines four dramatic chapters in British history, exploring how changing attitudes to gender politics, class inequality, mental health and children can challenge perceptions of the past and provide new answers to each mystery. She begins with the 16th-century witch hunts, when thousands of ordinary people, mostly women, were hunted down, tortured and killed across Scotland and England

programme.title: Lucy Worsley Investigates
programme.desc: The historian examines Britains deadliest pandemic, exploring how its monumental death toll changed the face of the country for ever and what the sudden loss of life meant for the church and religious beliefs, landowners and for the those who survived. Lucy also learns how DNA extracted from the skeletons of the plagues victims enabled scientists to finally identify a bacteria called Yersinia Pestis - a pathogen to which the mediaeval population had no immunity

programme.title: Lucy Worsley Investigates
programme.desc: Lucy uncovers the story of Edward IVs sons Edward and Richard, whose disappearance in 1483 has led to centuries of mystery. The princes were taken to the Tower of London for their own protection, but a priest declared the boys illegitimate and their uncle Richard next in line to the throne. The gaps in the historical record have fuelled 500 years of speculation, so Lucy speaks to history professor Tim Thornton, who has found evidence of one account of what happened written by Thomas More, while Richard III Society chair Matthew Lewis gives his views on the events

programme.title: Lucy Worsley Investigates
programme.desc: Lucy Worsley investigates how George IIIs mental illness changed Britain, uncovering royal papers and exploring how the attempt on the kings life by a mentally ill subject transformed psychiatry forever

programme.title: One Foot in the Grave
programme.desc: Victor is stuck at home while waiting to be called for jury service - but as time ticks on and his frustration grows, he begins to feel as if he is the one on trial. Richard Wilson stars in an episode featuring no other characters

programme.title: Lucy Worsley Investigates

programme.title: Rise of the Nazis
programme.desc: The documentary examines the actions of Hitler and his inner circle as the Third Reich faced collapse in the final weeks of the Second World War. Germany was losing the war but Hitler refused to surrender, instead pursuing a policy of Total War, which played out as a psychological drama within his inner circle

programme.title: Rise of the Nazis
programme.desc: At the end of March 1945, Nazi Germany is on the brink of collapse and with Berlin under daily bombardment, Hitler permanently retreated to his bunker, a series of 30 cramped rooms under the Reich Chancellery, where night and day merge into one. As his life becomes increasingly bizarre, Hitler and Joseph Goebbels look for signs from German folklore that fate will intervene

programme.title: Rise of the Nazis
programme.desc: By April 1945 most of Germany was occupied by invading Allied forces, with the two-million strong Soviet army just a mile from Hitlers hiding place In Berlin. With the Nazi regime disintegrating, most of Hitlers deputies were busy making plans to try to survive the end of the war and only his most die-hard loyalists stay by his side
